summary: Show the active execution summary from the planning module.

reads.surface: changed path arguments for scoped summary
verbose flag for broad diagnostic output
field selector for exact JSON drill-down

steps.description: Load the requested planning summary profile.
Return only requested JSON fields when --select is provided.
Emit the summary in the requested format.

guards: Treat missing planning state as unavailable summary data, not as a mutation request.
Task-scoped summary must omit unrelated historical/detail-heavy planning sections unless explicitly requested through full or broad compact detail commands.
Prefer --select for exact field drill-down and --verbose only for broad diagnostics.
